---
title: "The Rev. John Thomas Jacob"
---

## The Rev. John Thomas Jacob

**Dates:** (b.1839/40)

### Description

Vicar of Tormohun, Torquay

### Biography

He was appointed in 1900.  He married (1892) Edith Mary New.

### Letters

- Letter from July 17 [1900]
- Letter from July 9th      [1900]
- Letter from Sept 12  [1899?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
